overall.description: A first-person cable car ride through a futuristic cyberpunk city at dusk, featuring dense neon billboards, flying vehicles, and transitioning from enclosed commercial corridors to open aerial views before arriving at an NCART station. The footage is from the video game Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing high-fidelity ray-traced lighting and dense urban detail.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated transit through dense commercial billboard district

events.description: passing under first concrete overpass with heavy neon signage
flying vehicle passes underneath the cable car line

agents.ego_description: riding in an elevated cable car through a canyon of holographic advertisements and concrete infrastructure

notable_agents.action: flying car cruising below the transit line

entered.detail: large vertical billboard featuring a female character in purple clothing
horizontal billboard with green text and red background
massive concrete highway overpass with support pillars
pink neon sign with partial text visible
large advertisement showing ramen and Japanese cuisine

segments.scene_description: The cable car moves steadily through a dense commercial corridor lined with massive holographic billboards advertising various products. The environment is semi-enclosed by concrete overpasses, with neon signs illuminating the dusk atmosphere. A flying vehicle passes below as the car advances through the urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: high elevation aerial transit with panoramic views

events.description: cable car ascends to higher elevation, revealing distant hills
large flying truck passes at similar elevation heading opposite direction

agents.ego_description: ascending in the cable car with expansive views opening up to reveal distant hills and increased air traffic

notable_agents.action: large flying cargo truck moving perpendicular to the cable car path

entered.detail: large billboard featuring an astronaut helmet with text WHEN YOU ARE SKY HIGH
hazy mountains with palm trees and large white sign resembling Hollywood sign

segments.scene_description: The cable car breaks out of the enclosed corridor into open air, ascending to reveal a panoramic view of distant hills with a large sign. The sky is visible with scattered clouds, and flying vehicle traffic increases. The astronaut billboard becomes prominent as the car climbs higher above the city streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial transit corridor alongside brutalist architecture

events.description: passing close to angular concrete building, temporarily blocking right side view
moving past the concrete tower into open air with full cityscape visibility

agents.ego_description: cruising at high altitude alongside a massive concrete tower with the city skyline visible in the distance

entered.detail: angular concrete building with horizontal slit windows and weathered facade
dense cluster of illuminated skyscrapers and high-rise buildings

segments.scene_description: At the highest point of the journey, the cable car cruises alongside a massive brutalist concrete tower with distinctive horizontal windows. The distant city skyline stretches across the horizon while the hills remain visible to the right. The Moxxi billboard moves closer on the right side as the car maintains its elevated trajectory.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed transit corridor between dark buildings

events.description: entering darker corridor between buildings, ambient light drops significantly
passing through narrow gap between two dark concrete structures

agents.ego_description: descending through narrow passages between dark buildings with minimal exterior lighting

entered.detail: shadowed concrete wall with minimal window openings
metal ventilation structures on building exterior
smooth dark building surface with occasional lit windows

segments.scene_description: The cable car descends into a narrow corridor between dark buildings, with the lighting dropping to low levels. The open sky and distant views are replaced by enclosing concrete walls and ventilation structures. The environment becomes increasingly claustrophobic as the car approaches the station.

events.description: cable car decelerates as it enters the station terminal
arriving at NCART station platform with illuminated signage

agents.ego_description: arriving at the NCART station platform, decelerating to a stop near the ticket barriers and station attendant

notable_agents.action: station attendant standing behind the ticket counter

entered.detail: illuminated cyan NCART sign with transit system branding
red and white striped barrier gate blocking platform access
red automated vending machine with illuminated product display
metal elevator doors with call buttons on the side
illuminated map showing the cable car transit routes

segments.scene_description: The cable car slows to a stop inside the NCART station, revealing a platform with cyan neon signage, ticket barriers, and a transit map. The environment shifts from outdoor exposure to an artificially lit indoor terminal. A station attendant is visible behind the counter as the car comes to rest at the platform.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous cable car journey that transitions from a neon-lit commercial canyon into a wide aerial panorama before descending into a claustrophobic transit terminal. It begins by gliding through a dense urban corridor of holographic billboards and concrete overpasses, where flying vehicles drift below in the dusk light. As the car breaks free from the enclosure, the scene expands into an open sky, ascending past an astronaut billboard to reveal distant hills and a sprawling city skyline. The trajectory then cruises alongside a massive brutalist concrete tower and a Moxxi billboard at its highest peak before diving back down into a narrow, dark corridor of ventilation structures and enclosing walls. Finally, the environment shifts from the outdoor heights to an artificially lit indoor space as the car slows to a stop at the NCART station platform, complete with cyan signage and ticket barriers.
